title: non-pep695-generic-class
description: Generic class {name} uses Generic subclass instead of type parameters

structuralHints.treeSitterQuery:
(class_definition
  name: (identifier) @offender
  superclasses: (argument_list
    (attribute
      object: (identifier) @generic_type
      attribute: (identifier)))?
  (#match? @generic_type "^(Generic|typing\\.Generic)$")
  (block
    (expression_statement
      (assignment
        left: (identifier)
        right: (subscript
          value: (identifier) @type_var
          (#match? @type_var "^(TypeVar|typing\\.TypeVar)$"))))))

title: read-whole-file
description: Path.open() followed by read() can be replaced by {filename}.{suggestion}

structuralHints.treeSitterQuery:
(call
  function: (attribute
    object: (call
      function: (attribute
        object: (_)
        attribute: (identifier) @_open (#eq? @_open "open"))
      arguments: (argument_list))
    attribute: (identifier) @_read (#eq? @_read "read"))
  arguments: (argument_list)) @offender

title: write-whole-file
description: Path.open() followed by write() can be replaced by {filename}.{suggestion}

  (#eq? @_method "write"))
